case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. EDWIN VALLADARES CAMPOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, EDWIN VALLADARES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-08-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT EDWIN VALLADARES CAMPOS DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: PROOF OF SERVICE RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BY MAIL ON 10/16/18 WAS RETURNED TO THE COURT. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED NOV-15-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, EDWIN VALLADARES
ORDER RE:CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-17-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT EDWIN VALADARES CAMPOS. DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT EDWIN VALLADARES CAMPOS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, EDWIN VALLADARES
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOS, EDWIN VALLADARES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
